div.head: 336. Letter From Prime Minister Nehru to President Kennedy
div.note: [Source: Kennedy Library, National Security Files, Countries Series, India, Nehru Correspondence, 9/1/63-11/22/63. No classification marking. A copy of this letter is attached to a November 11 letter of transmittal from Ambassador Nehru to President Kennedy. (Department of State, Central Files, DEF 19 US-INDIA) This letter has not been declassified by the Indian Government.]
